entries.parsedImagePrompt: Eye-Level Medium Two-Shot, static frame. 2 distinct characters with completely different outfits and features, standing separately with clear space between them: On the left side of the frame, a 25-year-old man with a defined jaw, high nose, furrowed brows, stern almond eyes, thin lips, and short side-parted black hair, wearing a light blue shirt, gray trousers, and black shoes, stands at the doorway. His hands rest on his hips, his head tilted slightly with a wry fading smile, his chest deflated and his gaze cast towards the right side of the frame; while on the right side of the frame, a 20-year-old woman with a heart-shaped face, large almond eyes, slender brows, a small straight nose, full lips, and long black hair, wearing a pink t-shirt, light blue denim shorts, and white canvas sneakers, pauses mid-stride with her back to the camera, her body angled toward the distant door frame as she exits the room, head lowered and shoulders sloping, her long black hair caught mid-sway behind her. The background is a sunlit 30m² living room with a large window on the left casting warm golden light, a gray sofa and wooden table in the center, and a fan on the right. Key light enters from the right side of frame, soft natural diffused light, warm contemplative color tone, medium depth of field with both characters in focus. Artwork in cgstyle_9b, ultimate CG texture with Iray skin rendering, realistic physical light and shadow, transparent and deep imagery, translucent rosy smooth skin texture, anime-to-CG transformation, high-detail skin surface, cinematic render quality, 2.5D semi-realistic style.
entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] A sunlit 30m² living room with a large window on the left casting warm golden light, a gray sofa and wooden table in the center, and a fan on the right. The doorway is in the distance. The environment remains completely static.
[Characters] Bạch Dương: 25-year-old male, defined jaw, high nose, brows perpetually furrowed, stern almond eyes, thin lips, short side-parted black hair, tall, slender, light blue shirt, gray trousers, black shoes. Resigned and contemplative.
Tiểu Hy: 20-year-old female, heart-shaped face with large double-lidded almond eyes, slender arched brows, small straight nose, full lips, long black hair, slim build, moderate height, pink t-shirt, light blue denim shorts, white canvas sneakers. Exiting with back to camera.
Shot 1 (Medium Two-Shot, 2.35s): Static camera, environment remains unchanged.
Action: In extreme slow-motion, Bạch Dương's gaze subtly shifts toward the doorway as he slowly blinks, a final soft, quiet breath escaping him. Tiểu Hy's long black hair continues its gentle sway against her back, settling as she pauses just outside the frame.
